description_long: This is a large, cylindrical black barrel with a ribbed exterior, likely made of heavy-duty plastic or metal, designed for durability and strength. The surface is weathered and shows signs of use, with a matte, slightly rough finish and visible dirt or wear patterns. The top features a wide, open mouth with a reinforced rim and six pronounced, angular protrusions, possibly for stacking or securing a lid. Two short pipe fittings or spouts are present on the upper sides, suggesting it can be used for liquid storage or drainage. The base is flat and stable, and the overall construction appears robust, suitable for outdoor or industrial environments. There are no visible labels, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function.
description: A large, ribbed black barrel with a wide open top, reinforced rim, and two pipe fittings, showing signs of outdoor use and weathering.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, ribbed body, and two pipe fittings—one on the left side and one at the bottom right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ribbed cylindrical body and the absence of visible pipe fittings on this face.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the ribbed structure and no visible pipe fittings.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing both pipe fittings—one near the top right and one at the bottom left—plus the ribbed body.
